title: Power Supply Voltage Range
summary: The unit operates within a voltage range of 360-440V with a maximum phase imbalance of 2%.

title: Ambient Temperature Range
summary: The unit is designed for ambient temperatures between 18°C and 43°C.

title: High Pressure Cutout Setting
summary: High pressure cutout is set at 2500 KPa.

title: Low Pressure Cutout Setting
summary: Low pressure cutout is set at 350 KPa.

title: Oil Pressure Differential Setpoint
summary: Oil pressure differential setpoint is 600 KPa.

title: Oil Pressure Differential Time Delay
summary: Oil pressure differential time delay is 180 seconds.

title: Capacity Control Steps
summary: Capacity control is available at 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100% steps.

title: Minimum Off Time
summary: Minimum off time for the compressor is 15 minutes.

title: Low Pressure Cutout Differential
summary: Low pressure cutout differential is 0.5 bar.

title: High Pressure Cutout Differential
summary: High pressure cutout differential is 300 KPa.

title: Freeze Protection Setpoint
summary: Freeze protection setpoint is 7.0°C.

title: Freeze Protection Differential
summary: Freeze protection differential is 0.5°C.

title: Maximum Operating Pressure
summary: Maximum operating pressure is 1724 KPa.

title: Oil Pressure Safety Time Delay
summary: Oil pressure safety time delay is 15 seconds.

title: High Pressure Alarm Delay
summary: High pressure alarm delay is 3 seconds.

title: High Pressure Alarm Setpoint
summary: High pressure alarm setpoint is 600 KPa.

title: Compressor Minimum Off Time
summary: Compressor minimum off time is 15 minutes.

title: Compressor Minimum On Time
summary: Compressor minimum on time is 5 minutes.
